'''√s-t-g''' ('''kasatag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quaere|quaere]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-t-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quaere|quaere]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √s-t-g
|-
! Lemma
| kasatag
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thisatag || jisatag || shisatag || kisatag
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthusatag || jujusatag || shushusatag || kukusatag
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thusatag || jusatag || shusatag || kusatag
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thusatag || jusatag || shusatag || kusatag
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thesatag || jesatag || shesatag || kesatag
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothosatag || jojosatag || shoshosatag || kokosatag
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thosatag || josatag || shosatag || kosatag
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thosatag || josatag || shosatag || kosatag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || satag || satag || satag || satag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || satag || satag || satag || satag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || satag || satag || satag || satag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || satag || satag || satag || satag
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæsatag || jæsatag || shæsatag || kæsatag
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathasatag || jajasatag || shashasatag || kakasatag
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thasatag || jasatag || shasatag || kasatag
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thasatag || jasatag || shasatag || kasatag
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shasatag
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshasatag
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishasatag
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shasatagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshasatagnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishasatagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shasatagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshasatagnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishasatagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shasatagro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshasatagnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishasatagro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shasatagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshasatagnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishasatagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shasatagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshasatagnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishasatagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shasatagng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshasatagnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishasatagng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shasatagya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshasatagnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishasatagya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shasatagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshasatagnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishasatagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shasatagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshasatagnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishasatagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shasatagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasatagnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasatagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shasatagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshasatagnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasatagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shasatagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshasatagnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishasatagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shasatagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasatagnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasatagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shasatagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshasatagnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasatagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shasatagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshasatagnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishasatagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shasatagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshasatagnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishasatagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shasatagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshasatagnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasatagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shasatagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshasatagnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishasatagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shasatagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshasatagnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishasatagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shasatagmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasatagnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasatagmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
